plugins.name: recomby-geo
plugins.description: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) skill orchestration: 7 skills + 4 JSON schemas. Build brand context, audit visibility across LLMs, find gaps, brief content with human-in-loop slots, produce drafts, distribute, and re-audit with attribution. Per-client folder convention; reuses gego/geo-aeo-tracker/toprank shims under the hood.
